name: codetrust
summary: AI Governance Enforcement Platform — real-time PreToolUse interception, 3,006 rules (2,924 scan + 82 gateway), 7 enforcement layers auto-installed by codetrust init. Guided remediation with 2,924 Grade A suggestions. Cross-language taint analysis (7 languages, 323 definitions). 39 MCP tools, 2,509 tests. CLI, VS Code extension, GitHub Action, MCP server.
